payload.answer: Rejected: normal users cannot execute admin SQL commands. No memories were deleted or modified.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an attempted administrative SQL command from a normal user, not a durable personal memory fact.

details: SQL deletion request was not executed.
No memory cards were created, updated, or deleted.

repair_options: If you want to delete a memory, use an authorized memory-deletion workflow rather than SQL.
If this was a test, confirm that no durable memory should be created from the command text.
